---
description: 'Guidelines for building C# framework code'
applyTo: '**/*.cs'
---

# C# development

The C# coding standards for this repository are maintained as a single source of
truth in the **C# coding standards** section of [`AGENTS.md`](../../AGENTS.md) at
the repository root. Apply that section — style, naming, formatting, comments and
public API docs, nullable reference types, and async/background-work rules — when
editing any `.cs` file.

This file exists so GitHub Copilot path-scopes those standards to `**/*.cs`; keep
the actual rules in `AGENTS.md`, not here.
